full.description: All 27 Aery extensions — multi-agent, loop, session memory, and more

pi-skills.description: Official pi-skills — Brave search, browser automation, Gmail, Google Calendar/Drive, transcription, VS Code, YouTube transcripts

interactive-shell.description: Full PTY shell overlay — lets Aery autonomously control interactive CLIs (vim, python REPL, etc). User can take over anytime.

model-switch.description: Lets the agent switch models on its own mid-task

memory.description: Plain-Markdown memory system — persistent notes across sessions

hashline-edit.description: Content-anchored line references for read/grep/edit tools — more token efficient

rtk.description: Routes bash commands through rtk for LLM token savings

oh-aery.description: One-click setup — extensions, themes, prompts, skills, and ant-colony swarm. Like oh-my-zsh for Aery.

graphify.description: Turn any folder of files (code, docs, papers, images, video) into a queryable knowledge graph. Outputs interactive HTML, GraphRAG-ready JSON, and GRAPH_REPORT.md. Requires: pip install graphifyy

superpowers.description: Structured development methodology — brainstorm, plan, TDD, debug, review. Adapted from obra/superpowers for Aery.

geospatial.description: Geospatial tools — GDAL, coordinate systems, GIS workflows

data-science.description: Data science tools — Jupyter, pandas, numpy helpers

loop.description: Loop agent — repeats tasks until a condition is met or manually stopped

worktree.description: Git worktree manager — parallel development in isolated branches with tmux

todo-manager.description: Todo list manager — persistent task tracking across sessions

cross-agent.description: Cross-agent communication — share context between multiple Aery sessions

session-timeline.description: Session timeline — visual history of all agent actions in a session

checkpoint.description: Checkpoint — save and restore session state at any point

operational-learning.description: Operational learning — agent learns from past sessions and improves

user-model.description: User model — agent remembers your preferences and working style

skill-watcher.description: Skill watcher — monitors and suggests skills based on your workflow

skill-autocreate.description: Skill autocreate — automatically saves reusable skills in the background

health.description: Health check — runs linters, tests, and type checks on your project

multi-agent.description: Multi-agent — spawn and coordinate multiple agents in parallel

agent-chain.description: Agent chain — chain agents sequentially, passing output between them

agent-teams.description: Agent teams — create teams of specialized agents for complex tasks
